(born 4 April 1989) is a [Colombian](/wiki/Colombian_people "Colombian people") [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") [forward](/wiki/Forward_(association_football) "Forward (association football)"). He is currently free agent.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

**Yeison Javier Devoz Anaya** (born 4 April 1989) is a [Colombian](/wiki/Colombian_people "Colombian people") [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") [forward](/wiki/Forward_(association_football) "Forward (association football)"). He is currently free agent.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
